examples: They heard a bottle being smashed, then more raucous laughter.
Rauxa is reminiscent of our words "raucous" and "ruckus".
A raucous crowd of 25,000 delirious fans greeted the team at Grand Central Station.
Or so at least I tell myself now as I prepare for the raucous consumerism of downtown.
Russo often watches the raucous tea party events from his perch in the bus.
